PUPPET_FILE

    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', and, in or or expected, got '.'
      PsiElement(.)('.')

    PsiElement(|)('|')

    PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
        PsiErrorElement:'=>' or '[' expected, got '=~'
          <empty list>
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=~)('=~')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(REGEX)('/^0-9+$/')
      PsiElement(})('}')

    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
      PsiErrorElement:'=>' or '[' expected, got '*'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(*)('*')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(})('}')
